channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Eight people, including four children, shot in Coney Island, NYPD reports
item.description: Police recovered a firearm at the scene, according to the New York Police Department.

item.title: Second day of massive funeral for slain supreme leader
item.description: The multi-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in February by U.S.-Israeli strikes, features chants for revenge.

item.title: Trump speaks after severe weather delays Freedom 250 event
item.description: President Trump addressed the "Salute to America" Freedom 250 event in Washington, D.C., on July 4, honoring veterans and the Artemis II mission.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: Continuous coverage of breaking news and live events
